title: Percy's Comfort Kit
description: Make stairs into cozy chairs and sit anywhere! (Realms Compatible)
body:
Percy's Comfort Kit is a Minecraft datapack that contains several methods to sit.
There is an immersive method to turn stairs into chairs using carpets, and crafting recipes for a special chair item that lets you make a chair anywhere.

Percy’s Comfort Kit is compatible with Minecraft Realms. Whether you're playing in singleplayer, multiplayer, or on Realms, you'll have the same experience everywhere!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/STvYqXNC2T4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Turning stairs into chairs
Drop any carpet item onto a stair block cutout to make it a chair. Make sure the stair is upright.

This summons an interaction entity the player can sit on with an item display entity showing the dropped carpet.

To remove, punch the carpet or remove its supporting block. The carpet will be dropped.

## Make chairs anywhere
In order to not invade on the Minecraft survival experience too much, there is a different method to create chairs when not in stairs.

Drop any carpet item, it has to be dropped by an entity, and sneak while within 1.5 blocks of it.

This summons an interaction entity the player can sit on with an item display entity showing the dropped carpet.

If the carpet used to create this chair has a custom item model using the item_model component, it will be rotated to face the player.

To remove, punch the carpet or remove its supporting block. The carpet will be dropped.
